'''Mullinore''' was a [[Captain/Legends|captain]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] and commanding officer of the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Basilisk (Star Destroyer)|''Basilisk'']] placed under the command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Natasi Daala|Daala]] to protect the [[Maw Installation]]. Born on [[Taanab/Legends|Taanab]], he learned to always keep a formal air.

==Biography==
When the [[Sun Crusher]] was stolen by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Kyp Durron]], in the process destroying the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Hydra (Imperial I-class)|''Hydra'']], Daala ordered Mullinore to take the ''Basilisk'' in pursuit of the stolen [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]]. Amidst following the Sun Crusher, Mullinore was forced into a battle between [[Moruth Doole]]'s fleet on [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]] and Solo's [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], which left the ''Basilisk'' damaged.

Later, Mullinore would participate in actions against a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] colony on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] and an [[Attack on Mon Calamari|assault]] on the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] homeworld of [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]]. During the battle, Mullinore would bear witness to the destruction of the Star Destroyer ''[[Manticore]]''. Following the battle, Mullinore and his vessel retreated to the [[Cauldron Nebula/Legends|Cauldron Nebula]] where Daala began plans for a suicide attack on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] where the ''Basilisk'' would ram itself into the planet's surface, piloted by a skeleton crew. Initially, Mullinore did not take news of his ship's destruction well, but eventually agreed to the plan and even volunteered to captain the vessel to its death. Before Daala's plans could be realized, Durron arrived with the Sun Crusher and set the nebula into [[Supernova/Legends|supernova]]. The resulting explosion destroyed the ''Basilisk'' and all remaining hands onboard, Mullinore among them.
